sourceTitle: Generative AI in Teaching and Learning — Guidelines (ETH Zurich)
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Legal aspects of GenAI uses are covered by the existing rules for performance assessments and the 'declaration of originality'. Violations such as use of unauthorised aids or non-disclosure of their use will continue to be subject to disciplinary action.
